creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Henry Hu from comment #2)
On the other hand, I noticed that your build took 1:05:11 to reach 63%, while my complete build took 00:12:08. Because your build failure is caused by non-activity, you may try on a better machine. One possible explanation is that your machine does not have enough memory, and the build process is using the swap, which can be very slow.
